curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff. The patch rewrote the memcache crypto middleware in memcache_crypt.py, replacing weak SHA1-based MAC, simple SHA256 key derivation, and non-constant-time signature verification with HMAC-SHA384-based key derivation, proper encrypt-then-MAC, and constant-time comparison. The auth_token.py changes are callers of the crypto module and were refactored accordingly, but the core vulnerability resides in the crypto primitives themselves. Only 2 non-test source files were changed, so the patch is not noisy.
